summary: Comprehensive testing of new Quarantine and Notification features completed successfully. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed Quarantine page and Settings page load correctly with all UI elements functional.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - minor Recharts library issue, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Authentication - Admin login with admin@defender.io works correctly
GET /api/quarantine - List quarantined files endpoint returns 200
GET /api/quarantine?status=quarantined - Status filter works
GET /api/quarantine?threat_type=malware - Threat type filter works
GET /api/quarantine/summary - Returns summary statistics with expected fields
GET /api/quarantine/{entry_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent entry
POST /api/quarantine/{entry_id}/restore - Returns 404/400 for non-existent entry
DELETE /api/quarantine/{entry_id} - Returns 404/400 for non-existent entry
Quarantine endpoints require authentication (403 without token)
GET /api/settings/notifications - Returns notification settings with slack/email/elasticsearch config
POST /api/settings/notifications - Update settings works correctly
Notification settings require authentication (403 without token)
POST /api/settings/notifications/test - Test notification endpoint works
GET /api/elasticsearch/status - Returns status (not_configured expected)
Elasticsearch status requires authentication
POST /api/agent/event (yara_detection) - YARA detection events processed correctly
GET /api/dashboard/stats - Dashboard stats still working
GET /api/threats - Threats list still working
GET /api/alerts - Alerts list still working
GET /api/agents - Agents list still working
Frontend - Quarantine page loads with data-testid='quarantine-page'
Frontend - Quarantine page shows summary cards (Total, Quarantined, Restored, Deleted, Storage)
Frontend - Quarantine page Refresh button works
Frontend - Quarantine page filter dropdowns work
Frontend - Quarantine page shows empty state message correctly
Frontend - Settings page loads with data-testid='settings-page'
Frontend - Settings page shows Slack Integration section
Frontend - Settings page shows Email Notifications section
Frontend - Settings page shows Elasticsearch/Kibana section
Frontend - Settings page shows Notification Thresholds section
Frontend - Settings page Save Changes button present
Frontend - Settings page Test Slack/Email buttons present
Frontend - Settings page shows Elasticsearch status as 'not_configured'
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: Slack webhook, SendGrid email, and Elasticsearch integrations require real API keys/URLs to test actual notification delivery. Current tests verify API structure but not actual external service connectivity.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quarantine and Notification features fully tested. Quarantine page shows empty state (no files quarantined yet - expected). Settings page shows all notification channels as 'Inactive' since no real API keys configured. The auto-quarantine integration with YARA detection is implemented but requires actual malware files to trigger. External services (Slack, SendGrid, Elasticsearch) are MOCKED - they require real credentials to test actual delivery.

quarantine_api.auth_required: Working - All endpoints return 403 without token

notification_settings_api.update_settings: Working - POST updates settings in database
notification_settings_api.auth_required: Working - All endpoints return 403 without token

frontend_quarantine_page.summary_cards: Working - Shows Total, Quarantined, Restored, Deleted, Storage
frontend_quarantine_page.filters: Working - Status and Threat Type dropdowns functional
frontend_quarantine_page.empty_state: Working - Shows 'No quarantined files found' message

frontend_settings_page.slack_section: Working - Shows webhook URL input and Test button
frontend_settings_page.email_section: Working - Shows SendGrid API key, sender email, recipients
frontend_settings_page.elasticsearch_section: Working - Shows URL input and status indicator
frontend_settings_page.thresholds_section: Working - Shows severity levels for each channel

mocked_integrations.slack_webhook: MOCKED - Requires real Slack webhook URL to test actual delivery
mocked_integrations.sendgrid_email: MOCKED - Requires real SendGrid API key to test actual delivery
mocked_integrations.elasticsearch: MOCKED - Requires real Elasticsearch cluster URL to test actual logging
